customer_complaint: Bhai internet bahut slow chal raha hai, kuch load nahi hota
complaint_english: Internet is very slow, nothing loads
actual_root_cause: Too many devices connected, bandwidth saturated on Silver 599 plan
resolution_steps: Recommend disconnecting unused devices or upgrading plan
outcome: Customer upgraded to Gold 999, speed issue resolved

customer_complaint: Internet bilkul band hai subah se
complaint_english: Internet is completely down since morning
actual_root_cause: Fiber cable cut due to nearby construction
outcome: Field technician dispatched, fiber repaired within 6 hours

customer_complaint: WiFi baar baar disconnect ho raha hai devices se
complaint_english: WiFi keeps disconnecting from devices
actual_root_cause: WiFi channel congestion from neighboring networks
resolution_steps: Change WiFi channel to less congested one
outcome: WiFi channel changed, disconnection issue resolved

customer_complaint: Speed test mein 10Mbps aa raha hai lekin plan 100Mbps ka hai
complaint_english: Speed test shows 10Mbps but plan is 100Mbps
actual_root_cause: Router firmware outdated, not supporting full throughput
resolution_steps: Check router health and firmware version
outcome: Firmware updated, speed restored to plan level

customer_complaint: Naya phone WiFi se connect nahi ho raha hai
complaint_english: New phone cannot connect to WiFi
actual_root_cause: DHCP pool exhausted, too many device leases
outcome: DHCP pool refreshed, new device connected successfully

customer_complaint: Raat ko 8 baje ke baad internet bahut slow ho jaata hai
complaint_english: Internet becomes very slow after 8 PM
actual_root_cause: Area network congestion during peak hours
resolution_steps: Run speed test to confirm low speed
Log complaint for network capacity review
Suggest upgrading to higher plan for better priority
outcome: Complaint logged, network team increased area capacity

customer_complaint: Router pe red light aa rahi hai aur internet nahi chal raha
complaint_english: Red light on router and internet not working
actual_root_cause: ONT fiber connector loose, LOS alarm triggered
resolution_steps: Check router health for LOS alarm
Guide customer to check fiber cable connection
If unable to resolve, dispatch field technician
outcome: Field technician tightened fiber connector, service restored

customer_complaint: Gaming mein bahut lag aa raha hai, ping 200+ hai
complaint_english: High lag in gaming, ping over 200ms
actual_root_cause: Packet loss due to faulty ethernet cable, customer on WiFi with interference
resolution_steps: Run speed test to check latency and packet loss
Check router health for signal issues
Recommend wired ethernet connection for gaming
Suggest QoS configuration for gaming priority
outcome: Customer switched to wired connection, ping reduced to 15ms

customer_complaint: Netflix pe bahut buffering hoti hai, dekhna mushkil hai
complaint_english: Heavy buffering on Netflix, difficult to watch
actual_root_cause: DNS resolution slow, default DNS causing latency to streaming servers
resolution_steps: Suggest changing DNS to Google or Cloudflare
outcome: DNS changed to 8.8.8.8, streaming buffering resolved

customer_complaint: Bedroom mein WiFi nahi aata, sirf drawing room mein chalta hai
complaint_english: WiFi doesn't reach bedroom, only works in living room
actual_root_cause: Router placed in corner, thick walls blocking signal
resolution_steps: Check router health and signal strength
Recommend repositioning router to central location
Suggest mesh WiFi extender if home is large
outcome: Router repositioned, WiFi coverage improved significantly

customer_complaint: Router apne aap restart hota rehta hai din mein 5-6 baar
complaint_english: Router restarts by itself 5-6 times a day
actual_root_cause: Router overheating due to poor ventilation
resolution_steps: Check router health for temperature alerts
Guide customer on proper router placement for ventilation
If hardware issue, arrange router replacement
outcome: Router moved to ventilated area, reboots stopped

customer_complaint: Mera bill galat aaya hai, extra 500 rupaye charge kiye hain
complaint_english: Incorrect bill, charged extra 500 rupees
actual_root_cause: Installation charges incorrectly applied on second month
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and plan details
Assure customer of credit in next bill
outcome: Billing error identified, credit issued for next cycle

customer_complaint: Installation ka date de diya tha lekin koi nahi aaya
complaint_english: Installation date was given but no one showed up
actual_root_cause: Installation team overbooked, appointment not confirmed
resolution_steps: Check customer profile for installation status
outcome: Priority installation scheduled for next day, completed successfully

customer_complaint: Payment kar diya but account mein reflect nahi ho raha
complaint_english: Payment made but not reflected in account
actual_root_cause: Payment gateway delay, transaction stuck in processing
resolution_steps: Check customer profile for payment status
Log complaint for finance team review
Assure customer payment will be reconciled within 24-48 hours
outcome: Payment reconciled within 24 hours, account updated

customer_complaint: Plan upgrade karna hai, Diamond wala chahiye
complaint_english: Want to upgrade plan to Diamond
actual_root_cause: Customer wants higher speed for work from home
outcome: Plan upgraded to Diamond 1499, customer satisfied

customer_complaint: Koi aur mera WiFi use kar raha hai, unknown device dikh raha hai
complaint_english: Someone else is using my WiFi, unknown device visible
actual_root_cause: Neighbor guessed simple WiFi password
resolution_steps: Check device count and list connected devices
Guide customer to change WiFi password to strong one
outcome: WiFi password changed, unauthorized device removed

customer_complaint: VPN connect nahi ho raha hai office wala
complaint_english: Office VPN not connecting
actual_root_cause: Port blocking by default firewall settings on router
resolution_steps: Verify router health and firewall settings
Guide customer to adjust router firewall for VPN passthrough
outcome: VPN passthrough enabled, office VPN connected successfully

customer_complaint: WiFi password bhool gaya hu, naye phone mein connect karna hai
complaint_english: Forgot WiFi password, need to connect new phone
actual_root_cause: Customer forgot WiFi password
resolution_steps: Check router health for admin access
Guide customer to access router admin panel at 192.168.1.1
Help customer find and reset WiFi password
outcome: Customer accessed router admin, WiFi password retrieved

customer_complaint: Data khatam ho gaya hai, speed bahut slow ho gayi
complaint_english: Data exhausted, speed very slow now
actual_root_cause: FUP limit reached, speed throttled per plan policy
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and data usage
Suggest plan upgrade for higher data limit or unlimited plan
outcome: Customer understood FUP policy, upgraded to higher plan

customer_complaint: Connection cancel karna hai, bahut problems aa rahe hain
complaint_english: Want to cancel connection, too many problems
actual_root_cause: Frustrated customer with recurring issues, retention opportunity
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and complaint history
Offer plan upgrade or discount as retention
If insisted, process cancellation and log complaint
outcome: Customer retained with free plan upgrade for 3 months

customer_complaint: Meri complaint ka koi update nahi diya gaya
complaint_english: No update given on my complaint
actual_root_cause: Previous complaint stuck in queue, no assignment
outcome: Previous complaint escalated, resolved within 4 hours

customer_complaint: Kuch websites nahi khul rahi, baaki sab chal raha hai
complaint_english: Some websites not opening, everything else works
actual_root_cause: DNS resolution failing for specific domains
outcome: DNS changed to Google DNS, all websites accessible

customer_complaint: Router on hi nahi ho raha, koi light nahi jal rahi
complaint_english: Router not turning on, no lights
actual_root_cause: Power adapter failed
resolution_steps: Guide customer to check power cable and outlet
If still not powering on, arrange adapter/router replacement
outcome: Power adapter replaced, router functioning normally

customer_complaint: Smart TV mein internet nahi aa raha, phone mein chal raha hai
complaint_english: No internet on Smart TV but phone works fine
actual_root_cause: TV connected to 5GHz band with weak reception, phone on 2.4GHz
resolution_steps: Guide customer to connect TV to 2.4GHz band
Restart router to broadcast both bands
outcome: TV connected to 2.4GHz band, streaming working

customer_complaint: Installation ho gaya lekin speed plan se bahut kam aa rahi hai
complaint_english: Installation done but speed much lower than plan
actual_root_cause: Provisioning not completed, port still on default profile
resolution_steps: Run speed test to confirm low speed
Escalate to backend for provisioning correction
outcome: Provisioning corrected, speed matched plan within 2 hours

customer_complaint: Work from home mein video calls baar baar disconnect hoti hain
complaint_english: Video calls keep disconnecting during work from home
actual_root_cause: High jitter and packet loss on WiFi, too many devices competing
resolution_steps: Run speed test for latency and packet loss
Recommend wired connection for work laptop
Suggest reducing concurrent devices during calls
Consider plan upgrade for more bandwidth
outcome: Customer used wired connection, video call quality improved

customer_complaint: Router bahut garam ho raha hai, chhune mein bhi jalta hai
complaint_english: Router getting very hot, burns to touch
actual_root_cause: Router placed in enclosed cabinet with no airflow
resolution_steps: Check router health for temperature warnings
Guide customer to move router to open area
outcome: Router moved to open shelf, temperature normalized

customer_complaint: Plan downgrade karna hai, itna speed nahi chahiye
complaint_english: Want to downgrade plan, don't need this much speed
actual_root_cause: Customer on Platinum 2499, wants to reduce cost
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and current plan
Search available plans for lower tier
Get plan details for recommended plan
outcome: Customer downgraded to Gold 999, satisfied with savings

customer_complaint: Fiber cable toot gayi hai bahar construction mein
complaint_english: Fiber cable broken during outside construction
actual_root_cause: Physical fiber cable damage by third party
outcome: Emergency fiber repair completed in 8 hours

customer_complaint: Har mahine ka bill alag alag aata hai, samajh nahi aata
complaint_english: Bill amount different each month, confusing
actual_root_cause: Prorated charges and one-time fees causing bill variation
resolution_steps: Get plan details with pricing breakdown
If error found, log complaint for correction
outcome: Billing explained, customer understood prorated charges

customer_complaint: Internet subah achha chalta hai lekin shaam ko problem hoti hai
complaint_english: Internet works fine in morning but problems in evening
actual_root_cause: Household devices increase in evening - kids streaming, family on WiFi
resolution_steps: Suggest QoS settings or plan upgrade
outcome: Customer upgraded plan to accommodate family usage

customer_complaint: AirFiber lagwaya hai lekin signal fluctuate karta hai
complaint_english: AirFiber installed but signal keeps fluctuating
actual_root_cause: AirFiber antenna alignment slightly off, weather affecting signal
resolution_steps: Check connection status for signal levels
outcome: Antenna realigned, signal stabilized

customer_complaint: Zoom call mein meri awaaz kat ke jaati hai dusron ko
complaint_english: My voice cuts out for others on Zoom calls
actual_root_cause: Upload speed throttled due to bandwidth congestion
resolution_steps: Run speed test focusing on upload speed
Check device count for competing uploads
outcome: Customer prioritized wired connection for Zoom, issue resolved

customer_complaint: Complaint kiya tha 3 din pehle lekin koi solution nahi mila
complaint_english: Complained 3 days ago but no solution yet
actual_root_cause: Field visit required but not scheduled
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and complaint history
Schedule immediate field visit if needed
outcome: Complaint escalated, field visit scheduled for same day

customer_complaint: Mere plan mein kya kya milta hai batao
complaint_english: Tell me what's included in my plan
actual_root_cause: Customer seeking plan information
resolution_steps: Check customer profile for current plan
Explain plan features including speed, data, OTT apps
Suggest upgrade if customer needs more
outcome: Customer informed about plan features, no action needed

customer_complaint: PUBG mein bahut packet loss ho raha hai
complaint_english: High packet loss in PUBG
actual_root_cause: WiFi interference from microwave oven on same 2.4GHz frequency
resolution_steps: Run speed test to measure packet loss
Suggest switching to 5GHz band for gaming
Recommend ethernet cable for lowest latency
outcome: Switched to 5GHz band and ethernet, packet loss eliminated

customer_complaint: Mere paas AirFiber hai, fiber mein convert karna hai
complaint_english: I have AirFiber, want to convert to fiber
actual_root_cause: Customer wants to migrate from wireless to wired fiber
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and current AirFiber plan
Log request for fiber installation survey
outcome: Migration request logged, fiber installation scheduled

customer_complaint: Poora ghar mein bahut saare devices hain speed slow hai
complaint_english: Many devices in house causing slow speed
actual_root_cause: 12 devices on Silver 599 (30Mbps), severely over-subscribed
resolution_steps: Show mismatch between device count and plan capacity
Recommend Platinum 2499 or Titanium 3999 for heavy usage
outcome: Customer upgraded to Platinum 2499, speed distributed well

customer_complaint: Internet chalta hai lekin WhatsApp pe images nahi bhej paa raha
complaint_english: Internet works but can't send images on WhatsApp
actual_root_cause: Upload speed severely limited, connection only partial
resolution_steps: Run speed test checking upload separately
Restart router to reset upload channel
outcome: Router restart fixed upload issue, WhatsApp working normally

customer_complaint: Baarish ke baad se internet nahi chal raha
complaint_english: Internet not working since it rained
actual_root_cause: Water ingress in fiber junction box
resolution_steps: Check router health for fiber signal
Dispatch field technician for junction box inspection
outcome: Junction box sealed and fiber reconnected, service restored

customer_complaint: YouTube videos bahut slow load hote hain 4K mein
complaint_english: YouTube videos load very slow in 4K
actual_root_cause: Silver 599 (30Mbps) insufficient for 4K streaming which needs 25Mbps minimum
resolution_steps: With multiple devices, recommend Gold 999 or Diamond 1499
outcome: Customer upgraded to Gold 999, 4K streaming smooth

customer_complaint: Mera router ka admin password bhool gaya, settings change karni hai
complaint_english: Forgot router admin password, need to change settings
actual_root_cause: Customer forgot router admin credentials
resolution_steps: Help set up new admin password
outcome: Router factory reset, new admin password set

customer_complaint: Mere area mein kaunse plans available hain
complaint_english: What plans are available in my area
actual_root_cause: Customer exploring plan options
resolution_steps: Get details for plans of interest
outcome: Customer informed about all available plans

customer_complaint: Internet achha hai lekin ek room mein bilkul nahi aata WiFi
complaint_english: Internet good but WiFi completely absent in one room
actual_root_cause: Metal almirah between router and room blocking WiFi signal
resolution_steps: Check router health for signal pattern
Suggest repositioning router or removing obstruction
Recommend WiFi mesh extender for large homes
outcome: Router repositioned, WiFi coverage improved in dead zone

customer_complaint: Printer WiFi se connect nahi ho raha hai network pe
complaint_english: Printer not connecting to WiFi network
actual_root_cause: Printer only supports 2.4GHz, router broadcasting combined SSID on 5GHz
resolution_steps: Check device count and router settings
Check router health for band configuration
Guide customer to enable separate 2.4GHz SSID
outcome: Separate 2.4GHz SSID created, printer connected

customer_complaint: Mere account mein do baar payment kat gaya hai
complaint_english: Double payment deducted from my account
actual_root_cause: Payment gateway timeout caused duplicate transaction
resolution_steps: Verify double payment with transaction IDs
outcome: Duplicate payment identified, refund processed in 3 days

customer_complaint: CCTV cameras ke liye stable internet chahiye 24x7
complaint_english: Need stable 24x7 internet for CCTV cameras
actual_root_cause: Customer on basic plan, needs reliable upload bandwidth for cameras
resolution_steps: Check customer profile and current plan
Assess bandwidth needs for CCTV cameras
Recommend plan with sufficient upload speed
outcome: Customer upgraded to Diamond 1499 for reliable camera streaming

customer_complaint: Speed theek hai lekin internet baar baar 2-3 second ke liye kat jaata hai
complaint_english: Speed fine but internet cuts for 2-3 seconds frequently
actual_root_cause: Micro-disconnections from unstable DHCP lease renewal
resolution_steps: Run speed test to check packet loss pattern
Check router health for connection logs
If persists, log complaint for technician
outcome: Router restart fixed DHCP issue, micro-disconnections stopped

customer_complaint: Ghar shift ho raha hu, connection transfer karna hai
complaint_english: Moving house, want to transfer connection
actual_root_cause: Customer relocation request
resolution_steps: Provide timeline for disconnection and new installation
outcome: Transfer request logged, new installation scheduled at new address

customer_complaint: Titanium plan liya hai lekin 1Gbps speed nahi aa rahi
complaint_english: Titanium plan but not getting 1Gbps speed
actual_root_cause: Customer testing on WiFi which caps at ~400-500Mbps, needs ethernet for full speed
resolution_steps: Explain WiFi speed limitations vs ethernet
Guide customer to test with Cat6 ethernet cable
Verify gigabit speed on wired connection
outcome: Customer tested on ethernet, achieved 950Mbps, understood WiFi limitation
